name: Lemon-Cheese Pressed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Add sugar to the mixture and continue beating until well combined.
3. Blend in the egg, grated lemon peel, and lemon juice.
4. Gradually add flour and baking powder, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Using a cookie press, form the dough into desired shapes on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned on the edges.
9. Allow cookies to cool before removing from the baking sheet. Approximately 5 dozen 2-inch cookies are produced.
